title: Scirpus marginulatus
taxonomy: Scirpus marginulatus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It belongs to the genus Scirpus, which includes various species of sedges found in different parts of the world. The genus Scirpus is further classified under the family Cyperaceae, which is a group of monocotyledonous plants. Within the family Cyperaceae, Scirpus marginulatus is classified under the order Poales. This classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.
